question: A result of ___ or higher is considered a pass for the Private Pilot Written Examination.
In order to be issued a Private Pilot Licence (Aeroplane) you will need to have ___ hours of solo cross-country time.

In order for the holder of a land plane rating to acquire a seaplane rating on an aircraft which requires one crewmember, you will require ___ hours of training including ___ hours of dual flight instruction and ___ solo takeoffs and landings.

In order for the holder of a seaplane rating to acquire a land plane rating on an aircraft which requires one crewmember, you will require ___ hours of training including ___ hours of dual flight instruction and ___ solo takeoffs and landings.
A blanket type rating:
answers: Can be issued to cover high performance aircraft
Can be issued to cover all aeroplanes with a minimum flight crew of one pilot
Can be issued to cover two crew aeroplanes
Can be issued to cover all aeroplanes with a minimum flight crew of one pilot, excluding high performance aeroplanes
correctAnswer: Can be issued to cover all aeroplanes with a minimum flight crew of one pilot, excluding high performance aeroplanes

question: In order to obtain a private pilot licence, at least a category ___ medical is required.
